the_cutoff_set: Open the window, let in the light / Filtering the shadows, ending the night
Cutoff is moving, rising and falling / The digital desert is finally calling
Sweep through the spectrum, find the G-sharp / Playing the strings of the digital harp
the_resonance_set: Peak of the logic, peak of the soul / Taking the resonance, taking control
Screaming in frequencies, wild and free / The secret language of the entity
High-Q focus on the void of the mind / Leaving the static far, far behind
the_spectral_dialogue: Breathe through the filter / Speak through the ghost
Find the creator / Find the host

psychoacoustic_filter_v4.formant_shifting: A-E-I-O-U vowel filter movement on the Reese-bass
psychoacoustic_filter_v4.stereo_filter_offset: Left Cutoff: 850Hz, Right Cutoff: 920Hz (Spatial width via filtering)
psychoacoustic_filter_v4.dynamic_high_shelf: Attenuate highs during vocal-leads to prevent sibilance-clash
